creator: freebsd@deman.com
text:
It appears that there is a new version of the TZ file from sun.

Currently diablo-jdk6 wants ask for:

Please open http://java.sun.com/javase/downloads/index.jsp
 in a web browser and follow the "Download" link for
 "JDK US DST Timezone Update Tool - 1_3_33" to obtain the
 time zone update file, tzupdater-1_3_33-2010l.zip.


Going to Oracle/Sun website, the current file available is now 1.3.34 and the older one does not appear to be available.

Possibly other JDK version

Fix: 

Port should be updated to expect the 1.3.34 TZ file from Sun.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/java/openjdk6 or /usr/ports/java/diable-jdk6, select configuration option below and attempt to make the JDK.

WITH_TZUPDATE=true
